name: High-accuracy Low-Bit KV-Cache Quantization via Local Distribution Restoration
summary: arXiv:2607.16248v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Long-context large language model inference relies on the KV cache to avoid redundant attention computation, but incurs high memory and bandwidth o...
description: arXiv:2607.16248v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Long-context large language model inference relies on the KV cache to avoid redundant attention computation, but incurs high memory and bandwidth overheads. Low-bit KV-cache quantization reduces this cost, yet it severely degrade quality; particularly, one-bit quantization reduces accuracy from 84.2% to 47.8% on Llama-3.1-8B under RULER. Rather...
author: Gradwell Dzikanyanga, Yanqi Pan, Weihao Yang, Donglei Wu, Wen Xia, Hao Huang
